creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building the port stops with:
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: '/usr/bin/env python' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'lib/ruby/gems/2.4/gems/daemon_controller-1.2.0/rpm/get_distro_id.py'
Error: '/usr/bin/make' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'lib/ruby/gems/2.4/gems/daemon_controller-1.2.0/debian.template/rules'
Warning: You have disabled the licenses framework with DISABLE_LICENSES, unable to run checks
*** Error code 1

The full log can be found here:
https://pkg.fechner.net/data/120amd64-default/2019-03-01_14h47m18s/logs/errors/rubygem-daemon_controller-1.2.0.log
